body: PT Jasa Marga Tbk has divested 30.18% of its shares in PT Jasamarga Transjawa Tol (JTT) to three new investors for IDR 12.82 trillion, reducing its stake from 99% to 65%. The proceeds from the divestment will be used to pay off loan principal at the parent entity level, while the IDR 2.5 trillion from JTT's new shares issuance will be allocated to build new planned routes.
title: Jasa Marga divests 30% of Jasa Marga Transjawa Tol shares to three new investors for IDR 12.82 trillion.

body: PT Bank Pan Indonesia Tbk has modified the schedule for its Shelf-Registration Bond IV Phase II issuance, worth IDR 3.91 trillion, with a new public offering period from September 30 to October 3, 2024, and a listing on the Indonesia Stock Exchange on October 9, 2024. The 5-year bond will offer an interest rate of 7.25% per annum, with proceeds to be used to further boost business expansion, particularly in terms of credit disbursement.
title: PT Bank Pan Indonesia Tbk adjusts schedule for shelf-registration bond issuance, pushing back public offering and listing dates.

body: The Indonesian government is holding an auction for government securities, aiming to raise IDR 22 trillion to meet its 2024 state budget financing target, with 7 series of notes and bonds offered at yields ranging from 6.50% to 7.12% per annum. The auction, led by Bank Indonesia, allows all parties to submit bids through authorized primary dealers, with the goal of meeting the government's financing needs.
title: Indonesian Government to Hold Auction for Government Securities Worth IDR 22 Trillion to Meet 2024 State Budget Financing Target.

body: PT Global Sukses Solusi Tbk has transferred 1.78 million treasury shares, equivalent to 40% of its total treasury stock, to its board of directors, commissioners, and employees, following approval from the general meeting of shareholders. As of August 2024, the company's shareholder structure consists of various stakeholders, with Sony Rachmadi holding 29.03% and public shareholders holding 19.56%, with the company's shares closing at IDR 60 per share last week.
title: PT Global Sukses Solusi Tbk Transfers 1.78 Million Treasury Shares to Board Members, Commissioners, and Employees.

body: PT M Cash Integrasi Tbk plans to buy back up to 30.2 million shares, equivalent to 3.48% of its issued and paid-up capital, with a maximum budget of IDR 90.7 billion. The company's shareholders have granted the board of directors the authority to arrange the buyback, including setting the transfer price, with the stock currently trading at IDR 1,335, down 70.27% since the beginning of the year.
title: PT M Cash Integrasi Tbk to Buy Back Up to 30.2 Million Shares Worth IDR 90.7 Billion

body: PT Selamat Sempurna Tbk, an automotive spare part manufacturer, received a dividend income of IDR 8.06 billion (MYR 2.2 million) from its Malaysian subsidiary, Bradke Synergies Sdn Bhd. The company reported revenue of IDR 1.19 trillion and net profit of IDR 232.95 billion in the first half of 2024, according to IDNFinancials data.
title: PT Selamat Sempurna Tbk receives IDR 8.06 billion in dividend income from Malaysian subsidiary.

body: As of September 20, 2024, 30 companies are in the pipeline for an initial public offering (IPO) on the Indonesia Stock Exchange, with 11 of them holding assets worth over IDR 250 billion, primarily from the non-primary consumer, energy, and industry sectors. This year, 34 companies have already debuted on the IDX, raising IDR 5.15 trillion, while rights issues have generated IDR 34.42 trillion in proceeds.
title: Indonesia Stock Exchange Sees Surge in IPO and Rights Issue Pipeline with 30 and 11 Companies Respectively.

body: PT BPD Jawa Timur TBK reported a profit of IDR 620.86 billion in the first half of 2024, a 13.78% year-on-year decline due to increased operational costs, despite growth in gross interest Sharia income and net interest Sharia income. The company's assets, liabilities, and total equity also decreased, with assets reaching IDR 101.24 trillion, liabilities at IDR 87.57 trillion, and total equity at IDR 11.87 trillion.
title: PT BPD Jawa Timur's profit drops 13.78% to IDR 620.86 billion in H1 2024 due to increased operational costs.

body: Bank Indonesia will permanently terminate the publication of Jakarta Interbank Offered Rate (JIBOR) starting January 1, 2026, aiming to drive market players to utilize the transaction-based Rupiah Reference Rate, Indonesia Overnight Index Average. The JIBOR termination will trigger reference adjustment calculations for financial contracts that use JIBOR, with fallback clauses ensuring a smooth transition to the new rate.
title: Bank Indonesia to Permanently Terminate Jakarta Interbank Offered Rate Publications Starting January 1, 2026

body: PT Akr Corporindo Tbk has injected IDR 18 billion into its subsidiary, PT Anugerah Krida Retailindo (Akrida), increasing Akrida's issued and paid-up capital to IDR 967.16 billion from IDR 949.16 billion. The capital boost will strengthen Akrida's business and subsidiaries' capital structure, with Akra's stake in Akrida rising to 99.99%, leaving 0.01% to PT Akr Niaga Indonesia.
title: Akr Corporindo injects IDR 18 billion into subsidiary Anugerah Krida Retailindo to strengthen business and capital structure.

body: On Wednesday, September 25, PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia Tbk shares were sold in significant numbers, totalling 4.18 billion shares, contributing to a rise in foreign sales volume at 7.17 billion shares, while foreign investors sold shares in two banking companies, PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia Tbk and PT Bank Mandiri Tbk. Meanwhile, PT Maharaksa Biru Energi Tbk, an e-commerce company, topped the buy list with 109.38 million shares purchased, followed by PT Bukalapak.com Tbk and other companies in the renewable energy, shipping, and industrial development sectors.
title: Foreign investors sell significant shares in Indonesian companies, led by PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk, while buying into renewable energy and e-commerce firms.
